introSection: Mad Mouse is a steel Wild Mouse roller coaster located at Little Amerricka in Marshall, Wisconsin, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Mad Mouse opened at Enchanted Forest in Porter, Indiana in 1960. It operated until the closure of the park in 1990 and was auctioned on October 19, 1991. The attraction was purchased by Little Amerricka, who reopened it in 1993.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 3 cars. Riders are arranged inline in 2 rows for a total of 2 riders per car.

fullText:
Mad Mouse is a steel Wild Mouse roller coaster located at Little Amerricka in Marshall, Wisconsin, USA.

Mad Mouse opened at Enchanted Forest in Porter, Indiana in 1960. It operated until the closure of the park in 1990 and was auctioned on October 19, 1991. The attraction was purchased by Little Amerricka, who reopened it in 1993.



3 cars. Riders are arranged inline in 2 rows for a total of 2 riders per car.
